channel.title: Sensor on Built by Nikhil
channel.description: Recent content in Sensor on Built by Nikhil

item.title: Day 9: Light Sensor — Arduino Learns to See
item.description: Day 9 of Learn Coding with Arduino — wire up a photoresistor (LDR) to read how bright the room is, and use a threshold to decide if it’s dark enough to turn on a light.

item.title: Day 14: Project — Auto Fan System
item.description: Day 14 of Learn Coding with Arduino — build an automatic fan that turns on when the room gets too bright or too hot, with a buzzer alert. Everything from Days 1-13 in one project.

item.title: Day 16: Show Sensor Values on the LCD
item.description: Day 16 of Learn Coding with Arduino — display live potentiometer and LDR readings on the 16x2 LCD without flicker. Arduino gets a dashboard.

item.title: Day 20: Sound Sensor — Clap to Control
item.description: Day 20 of Learn Coding with Arduino — wire up a KY-038 sound sensor, detect claps, and toggle an LED with a sound.
